figures.caption: Fig. 12. From-scratch training on 10 sequential domains: loss curve and active dimensions. Loss spikes at each domain boundary trigger expansions.
Fig. 11. GPT-2 activation space by layer, colored by true domain. Each subplot shows PCA projection of layer activations with cluster purity (p) and number of clusters (k).
Fig. 10. Cluster center similarity matrix for toy K-Means experiment.
Fig. 8. GPT-2 layer-wise domain separability. Purity drops in middle layers (3–7) where cross-token attention mixes representations, then recovers in deep layers (8–12).

Fig. 7. Real-world experiment: Wikipedia → Code → Chat. LACE fires precisely at both domain boundaries (orange/purple vertical lines), expands from d = 32 to d = 34, and outperforms Fixed-Small while approaching Fixed-Large accuracy.
